Subject: Black Adam (2022)
Description: Bestowed with the almighty powers of the gods, Black Adam's unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

Subject: Sleepwalking (2008)
Description: A girl (AnnaSophia Robb) tries to cope with her mother's abandonment by forging a bond with her troubled uncle (Nick Stahl).

Two planes almost collide after a flash of light paralyzes an air traffic controller for a few seconds. Suspended from his job, he must now figure out why he's experiencing a repetition of sounds and events in his life at the same time every day.

Subject: Jackie (2016)
Description: The assassination of JFK is seen through the eyes of Jackie Kennedy. The days leading up to the tragedy and the immediate aftermath are chronicled, as experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

Subject: We Live in Time (2024)
Description: A surprise encounter brings together a couple, changing the course of their lives. Challenged by the limits of time, they learn to cherish each moment of their decade-spanning and movingly rare love story.

Subject: Your Monster (2024)
Description: A soft-spoken actress finds her voice again when she meets a terrifying but weirdly charming monster that lives in her closet.

Subject: Queer (2024)
Description: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

Subject: Unlocked (2017)
Description: Called back into action by her mentor, CIA agent Alice Racine learns that uncovered classified information has been compromised. She must now turn to former soldier Jack Alcott to help her prevent a lethal biological attack on London.

Subject: Speed (1994)
Description: A SWAT team ace (Keanu Reeves) must keep the speed of a Santa Monica bus above 50 mph, or a madman's (Dennis Hopper) bomb will explode.

Subject: A French Forger (2015)
Description: Artist and forger Guy Ribes shares the secrets behind the creation of his art.

Subject: Good Time (2017)
Description: A bank robber stops at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching himself into a nightlong odyssey through New York's dark and dangerous criminal underworld.

Subject: Sunshine Cleaning (2008)
Description: Hoping to create a better life for herself and her son, a cleaning woman (Amy Adams) starts a crime-scene-cleanup business with her unreliable sister (Emily Blunt).

Subject: Past Lives (2023)
Description: Nora and Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Decades later, they are reunited for one fateful week as they confront destiny, love and the choices that make a life.

Subject: 2 Days in New York (2012)
Description: A happily married man's (Chris Rock) sanity is pushed to the limit when his wife's (Julie Delpy) crazed, over-sexed French relatives crash their cramped New York apartment.

Subject: Spare Parts (2015)
Description: Four Hispanic high-school students take on reigning champions M.I.T. in a national contest with a robot they built with $800 and parts from used cars.

Subject: Beyond the Black Rainbow (2011)
Description: A heavily sedated woman (Eva Allan) with ESP tries to escape from the secluded commune where she's been held captive.

Subject: Spaceship Earth (2020)
Description: In 1991 eight visionaries embark on a two-year experiment to quarantine themselves inside Biosphere 2 -- a self-engineered replica of Earth's ecosystem.

Subject: Trap (2024)
Description: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

Description: Thackery introduces a new kind of cure to his inebriation ward; Brockhurst demands the return of his girls; Cornelia presents evidence of the company's wrongdoing to Henry; Thackery performs plastic surgery on Abby.

Description: How the doctor arrived is revealed; the conflict between Edwards and Gallinger comes to a head; Cleary and Harriet launch a joint business venture.

Description: Deals complicate a murder investigation when a mob boss' son offers to incriminate his father, while the father counters with information.

Subject: Law & Order - Patriot
Description: When a man suspects a neighbor is a terrorist waiting to strike, he resorts to vigilantism, then says he acted in self-defense.

Subject: Law & Order - American Jihad
Description: A troubled young man (guest star Wil Horneff) motivated by his religious beliefs becomes the prime suspect in a double homicide.

Subject: Law & Order - Shangri-La
Description: The murder of a high-school English teacher reveals a love triangle involving a 16-year-old and her faculty lover.

Subject: Law & Order - True Crime
Description: A rock singer's body is found in a garbage can with large amounts of heroin and cocaine in her system.

Subject: Law & Order - Tragedy on Rye
Description: Detectives hope vacation video shot by a couple will help lead them to the murderer of an actress found shot to death in her apartment, but matters get complicated when the tourists decide to make a quick buck by selling the tape to a TV station.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Three Little Beers
Description: The trio tries golf.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Three Missing Links
Description: B.O. Botswaddle is looking for a new star to appear in a jungle epic so he decides to cast Curly as a gorilla.

Subject: The Three Stooges - All Gummed Up
Description: Pharmacist Stooges invent a youth serum.

Subject: Bones - The End in the Beginning
Description: When a body is discovered at a popular nightclub, everyone is a suspect.

Subject: Bones - Harbingers in the Fountain
Description: Angela's psychic, Avalon Harmonia (Cyndi Lauper), alerts Brennan and Booth to the presence of a mass grave beneath a fountain.

Subject: Bones - The Bond in the Boot
Description: Booth and Brennan investigate when a man is murdered for the undisclosed contents of his briefcase; the team looks for alternate funding for Wendell when he loses his scholarship.

Subject: Bones - The Plain in the Prodigy
Description: Human remains are found next to a railroad; Cam deals with the stress of being a new parent; Booth tries to keep Cam's stepdaughter in line.

Subject: Bones - The Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
Description: When human remains are found at a neighborhood block party, scandals and suburban politics give many people a motive; Booth's son tries to find a girlfriend for his father.

Subject: A Knight's Tale (2001)
Description: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy), competes against nobles in 14th-century France.

Subject: Hook (1991)
Description: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy.

Subject: Field of Dreams (1989)
Description: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees ``Shoeless`` Joe Jackson's ghost and other marvels.

Subject: Rudy (1993)
Description: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

Subject: Law & Order - The Ring
Description: A diamond ring identifies the skeletal remains of a murder victim who was believed killed in the World Trade Center collapse.

Subject: Law & Order - Hitman
Description: Detectives suspect a young bride and her reputed lover (guest stars Gretchen Egolf and Bobby Cannavale) hired a hit on her husband.

Subject: Law & Order - Open Season
Description: The acquittal of an alleged cop-killer leads to the murder of a defense attorney and a suspect who may belong to a white supremacy group.

Subject: Law & Order - Asterisk
Description: Detectives accuse a professional ballplayer of killing the limousine driver who supplied him with steroids.

Subject: Law & Order - The Wheel
Description: The smoldering corpse of an Asian girl is found outside the Chinese consul general's apartment, and detectives suspect she immolated herself as a political statement.

Subject: Law & Order - Mother's Day
Description: Detectives suspect foul play when a teenager dies after being struck by a vehicle in front of a coffee shop.

Subject: Law & Order - Chosen
Description: When half of a two-man gambling operation is found murdered, the detectives finger his partner as the prime suspect.

Subject: Law & Order - Under God
Description: A vigilante priest kills a notorious drug dealer in the name of God; Briscoe is reminded of his daughter's death at the hands of a trafficker.

Subject: Law & Order - Absentia
Description: Two seemingly unrelated murders, stolen jewels and a case of mistaken identity lead to a defendant being tried for a crime without being present at the trial. Mandy Patinkin and Andrew McCarthy guest star.

Subject: China: Nature's Ancient Kingdom - West: A Fragile Paradise
Description: In western China, the vast and remote Tibetan Qinghai Plateau is home to animals such as snow leopards and foxes; they have adapted perfectly to survive in the rugged landscape of the national parks.

Subject: China: Nature's Ancient Kingdom - Central: A Balancing Act
Description: China's mountainous central region is home to some of the country's most iconic creatures, from pandas to golden snub-nosed monkeys, who are making their home in the safety of its two enchanting national parks.

Subject: China: Nature's Ancient Kingdom - East - The Last Refuge
Description: China's Eastern region is one of the most densely populated on Earth, but people are making space for nature and some of the rarest animals on earth are finding sanctuary in its four new national parks.

Subject: Hook (1991)
Description: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy.

Subject: Field of Dreams (1989)
Description: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees ``Shoeless`` Joe Jackson's ghost and other marvels.

Subject: Rudy (1993)
Description: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

Subject: Jerry Maguire (1996)
Description: A Los Angeles sports agent (Tom Cruise) finds love with a pretty accountant (Renee Zellweger) after an attack of conscience costs him his job and fiancee.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Bully
Description: Blake must work with her retired police captain father and her detective brother to solve a series of murders in Kansas City.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Black Queen
Description: A murder investigation results in Garcia delving into her hacker past -- and reconnecting with a former flame.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Road Home
Description: As the team searches for a vigilante killer in Cleveland, Rossi's former Marine sergeant goes missing in Los Angeles; J.J.'s secret catches up with her.

Subject: Criminal Minds - 200
Description: When J.J. is abducted, the team looks into her time at the State Department in hope of finding clues regarding her disappearance.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Mr. & Mrs. Anderson
Description: The team searches for a pair of suspects responsible for several murders near Pittsburgh; Morgan and Garcia make Valentine's Day plans with their significant others.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Gabby
Description: The BAU makes startling discoveries as they search for a 4-year-old girl who went missing while staying with a relative.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Persuasion
Description: The BAU must determine the true cause and motive when several drowned people are discovered in the Las Vegas desert.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - Serengeti
Description: The grassland of the Serengeti is home to herbivores in Africa.

Subject: Earth's Great Seasons - Spring
Description: Àngels Barceló shows us how spring comes to our planet, from bear cubs to flowers in the desert. In addition, we discovered how animals face the challenges of this season.

Subject: Earth's Great Seasons - Summer
Description: Celebrate the glorious nature of summer on Earth and the extraordinary ways in which animals and plants respond to challenges.

Subject: The American President (1995)
Description: A political rival turns the widowed president's (Michael Douglas) romance with an environmental lobbyist (Annette Bening) into an election-year issue.

Subject: Jerry Maguire (1996)
Description: A Los Angeles sports agent (Tom Cruise) finds love with a pretty accountant (Renee Zellweger) after an attack of conscience costs him his job and fiancee.

Subject: Real Genius (1985)
Description: Tech-school prodigies (Val Kilmer, Gabe Jarret) learn their laser project is actually a death beam funded by the military.

Subject: Weird Science (1985)
Description: Gary and Wyatt design their ideal woman on a computer, and a freak electrical accident brings her to life in the form of the lovely, superhuman Lisa.

Subject: Galaxy Quest (1999)
Description: Aliens, believing actors to be real heroes, enlist cast members of a sci-fi TV series to help save their people.

Subject: Spaceballs (1987)
Description: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

Subject: The Graham Norton Show
Description: Kate Winslet, Jacinda Ardern, Alan Carr, Seth Meyers, Cat Burns.

Subject: NCIS - Hit and Run
Description: The investigation into a car accident that killed a Marine and a young woman brings up upsetting childhood memories for Abby; Ducky says the crash may not have been an accident.

Subject: NCIS - Canary
Description: The NCIS team finds an infamous hacker who could lead them to the world's most wanted cyber terrorist.

Subject: NCIS - Hereafter
Description: While on leave as he mourns the loss of his wife, Director Vance uncovers information that makes him question everything.

Subject: NCIS - Detour
Description: When Jimmy and Ducky disappear while transporting a body from a crime scene, the team races to find them.

Subject: NCIS - Prime Suspect
Description: Gibbs' barber asks for help when he suspects his son is involved in a high-profile crime; the team looks into the disappearance of Navy funds.

Subject: NCIS - Seek
Description: A woman asks the NCIS team to investigate the death of her husband, a Marine who specialized in K-9 bomb detection; Vance interviews nannies.

Subject: Rudy (1993)
Description: With heart and determination an Illinois youth (Sean Astin) tackles shortcomings to play Notre Dame football.

Subject: College Football - Wake Forest at Duke
Description: Tar Heel State foes prepare for the postseason as the Blue Devils host the Demon Deacons. Duke secured bowl eligibility by prevailing over another regional rival, 32-25 at North Carolina on Nov. 22. Wake Forest won six of its last seven.

Subject: College Football - Virginia Tech at Virginia
Description: The Hokies face the No. 18 Cavaliers in the Commonwealth Clash series. Virginia Tech is 23-2 versus rival Virginia on the gridiron since 1999. UVA will play in the ACC title game with a win, or with combined losses from SMU, NC State and Syracuse.

Subject: College Football - Notre Dame at Miami
Description: The No. 6 Fighting Irish face a tough test in the No. 10 Hurricanes. Miami won the last meeting, 41-8 in 2017. Notre Dame came up short against Ohio State 34-23 in the national title game last season. Miami was ranked as high as No. 4 in 2024.

Subject: College Basketball - Southern Mississippi at Miami
Description: The Hurricanes begin a run of five straight home games when they host the Golden Eagles. Miami scored a 75-66 victory Dec. 2 at Ole Miss in the SEC/ACC Challenge to improve to 7-2. Freshman forward Shelton Henderson led the Canes with 18 points.

Description: Julian Sayin's journey to becoming Ohio State's starting quarterback. See Purdue honor running back, Devin Mockobee. Hear why Max Bredeson followed in his brothers' footsteps at Michigan.

Subject: B1G Live
Description: Hear news and updates from coaches and players from around the Big Ten conference.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Indiana at Illinois
Description: The Fighting Illini (7-1) and Hoosiers (8-1) begin their Big Ten schedules with this duel. Illinois has won two straight meetings after Indiana had claimed the previous 16. Senior guard Shay Ciezki averaged 28.5 points over Indiana's last four games.

Subject: College Basketball - Ohio State at Northwestern
Description: Bruce Thornton and the Buckeyes hit the road for their Big Ten opener, against the Wildcats. Thornton averages 20.6 points per contest and shoots 61% from the floor. Northwestern owns a three-game series win streak for the first time since 1967.

Subject: College Basketball - Rutgers at Michigan
Description: The No. 3 Wolverines (7-0, 0-0 Big Ten) host the Scarlet Knights (5-4, 0-1). Rutgers drew a tough start in Big Ten play, falling 81-65 to No. 1 Purdue on Dec. 2. Michigan won its three Players Era Championship games by an average of 36.7 points.

Subject: College Basketball - Washington at USC
Description: The No. 24 Trojans look to move to 2-0 in conference play this season when they host the Huskies. USC started its Big Ten campaign by besting its former Pac-12 rival Oregon 82-77 on Dec. 2. Ex-Auburn guard Chad Baker-Mazara paced USC with 25 points.

Subject: The B1G Moment - Isaiah Thomas
Description: Isaiah Thomas, C.J. Wilcox, coach Lorenzo Romar, play-by-play Gus Johnson and more take a look back on Thomas' game-winning shot at the buzzer to secure Washington's victory over Arizona in the 2011 Pac-10 Championship game.

Subject: B1G Trailblazers - Detlef Schrempf
Description: From a German exchange student to three-time NBA All Star, Detlef Schrempf paved the way for European basketball stars. An advocate and trailblazer for the Washington community, Schrempf found a home and family in Seattle.

Subject: On The Court
Description: Hear from Iowa's Hannah Stuelke. Get to know Maryland's Saylor Poffenbarger. Learn how Minnesota's Dawn Plitzuweit inspires her players and Illinois' Berry Wallace's Big Ten family ties.

Subject: The B1G Moment - Tyus Edney
Description: Take a look back at the story behind the Tyus Edney coast-to-coast shot to stun Missouri in the 1995 NCAA Tournament as the top-seeded UCLA Bruins took down the 8th-seeded Tigers in the last 4 seconds of the game.

Subject: On the Ice
Description: Hear from Buckeye and Ohio native Nathan McBrayer. Learn about Minnesota's Mittelstadt brothers' relationship, Notre Dame's Cole Knuble on confidence and influence, and Penn State's rise with Gavin McKenna.

Subject: The Journey: Big Ten Football
Description: Learn why Indiana's Aiden Fisher wears the number four. Get to know Rutgers kicker Jai Patel. See why Wisconsin's Ricardo Hallman never wavered during his career with the Badgers.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Purdue at Michigan
Description: The No. 6 Wolverines (7-1) and Boilermakers (5-3) begin Big Ten play. Michigan has claimed all six meetings since 2019-20 after an 87-60 result last season. Purdue won three of its last four. Olivia Olson (MICH) is averaging 17.3 points per game.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Ohio State at Northwestern
Description: The No. 23 Buckeyes (6-1) roll into a Big Ten opener with the Wildcats (6-2). Ohio State has won four in a row overall, and five straight over Northwestern after a 92-62 result in 2024-25. Grace Sullivan leads the Wildcats with 22.8 points per game.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Maryland at Minnesota
Description: The Golden Gophers host the unbeaten No. 7 Terrapins in the Big Ten opener for both. Maryland is 10-0 for the second consecutive season, with Oluchi Okananwa's 13.7 points per game a team high. Minnesota seeks its first win over Maryland since 2018.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Michigan State at Wisconsin
Description: The Badgers draw the unbeaten No. 20 Spartans in a Big Ten opener. Michigan State returns to the court for the first time since clinching a Nassau Championship title against Clemson on Nov. 30. MSU won seven of the last eight meetings with Wisconsin.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Washington at USC
Description: Former Pac-12 rivals meet in the Big Ten as the No. 16 Trojans (6-2) host the No. 21 Huskies (8-0). USC is 9-2 against Washington since 2017-18. Alaskan junior guard Sayvia Sellers has powered Washington's unbeaten start with 19.1 points per game.

Description: It's a race of prehistoric proportion as men, women, children and seniors compete to be the 2025 T-Rex World Champion!

Subject: 2025 Corgi Races at Emerald Downs
Description: Get ready for the cutest and most unpredictable event of the year as over 100 Corgis race for the Championship trophy!

Subject: Roofball - 2025 RFA Cup
Description: Players from around the country compete for Roofball's RFA Cup championship. Played in Lancaster,Ohio, at the first roof ever purpose-built for the game.

Subject: The 2024 Onewheel World Championship - Race For The Rail
Description: The World Championship Onewheel Racing event featured the best Onewheel riders zooming down Sky Tavern Ski Mountain in a boardercross style event for $10,000. This race took place outside of Reno, Nevada on August 9th, 2024.

Subject: 2025 Golden Tee Golf World Championships
Description: The world's best Golden Tee players converge at the Palms Casino Resort in Las Vegas to battle for nearly $200,000 in prizes. The stakes are high, the legends are ready -- who will take home the title in the game that helped shape esports?

Subject: IWL Wrestball 3x3
Description: The explosive fusion of basketball, rugby, and wrestling -- where agility, power, and strategy collide. Be the first to experience this new-rules-arena revolution.

Subject: Major League Paintball - 2025 3v3 World Championship
Description: Watch the Great American Events on ESPN.

Subject: 2025 NWLA All-Star Game
Description: Top Wiffle Ball® leagues from across the country come together for the NWLA All-Star Game -- a fast-paced, backyard showdown of elite national talent.

Subject: OmegaBall World Invitational
Description: Three-team soccer with no offsides, on a circular pitch. Teams defend their own goal, but can score on the other two, and it's 10x more goals than traditional soccer!

Subject: The 4th Annual BullShooter Invitational Shootout
Description: Watch as a selection of the world's best darts players battle for glory after a dominant run on the 2024-2025 BullShooter Tour. Who will take the title -- and who will make history in the first-ever Ladies Invitational Bracket?

Subject: 2025 Extreme Archery Championship
Description: Experience the thrill of Extreme Archery as elite teams from the USA and Canada face off in a fast-paced arena battle with foam-tipped arrows. Dodge, shoot, and strategize -- non-stop action makes this a must-watch for fans of unconventional sports!

Subject: World Axe & Knife Throwing Championship 2025
Description: Axes and knives fly as we watch the finals to crown World Champions in all Axe and Knife Throwing disciplines for the 2025 World Axe & Knife Throwing Championship.

Subject: Battle Court Jai-Alai Championship VII
Description: Battle Court VII is the most highly anticipated Jai-Alai event of the year.The World Jai-Alai League's Championship game features Udonis Haslem's two-time title holders, The Renegades, versus the newest expansion team in the League, The Fireballs.

Subject: 11th Annual Outhouse Races
Description: Teams build their own custom outhouses -- each equipped with a mandatory toilet seat for the driver and a roll within reach. One outhouse races another, with teams straining to push their rig across the finish line and be crowned Fastest Throne.

Subject: Swiss Stone Tossing
Description: Contestants grunt and hurl earth-shaped stones in their natural state -- no polish, no shine. The furthest legal toss without crossing the line takes the win. It's simple, primal, and strangely satisfying.

Subject: Mailboat Jumping
Description: Carriers compete to secure a spot on the historic Mailboat Team, jumping from boat to dock and back again while in motion. It's part timing, part chaos,and a century-old tradition that defines summer. Don't fall in-or do, but don't expect sympathy.

Subject: 2025 National Bubble Gum Blowing Championship
Description: Finalists chew. They blow. They pray it doesn't pop too soon. The biggest unburst bubble wins. One gum blower will be crowned the 2025 Champion. The rest go home sticky and defeated.

Subject: FlingGolf: LFC-5 Longest FlingShot Championship
Description: With FlingSticks and golf balls, top World League FlingGolf Pros battle to outdistance each other and take home the LFC Belt.

Subject: The Goodyear Blimp Sky Race of the Century
Description: To mark the 100th anniversary of the Goodyear Blimp in 2025, Goodyear brought all three of its U.S. airships to Akron, Ohio for the Sky Race of the Century. While blimps aren't known for speed, this race has no shortage of action.

Subject: Turf Wars Adult Kickball Tournament

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part One: 1869-1932
Description: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part Two: 1933-1959
Description: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part Three: 1960-1970
Description: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part Four: 1969-1979
Description: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part Five: 1980-1989
Description: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

Subject: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football - Part Seven: 2000-2009

Description: The Texans face the Colts in a pivotal AFC South outing. Houston is 6-2 since starting 0-3, winning three in a row. Indianapolis' division lead has shrunk to two games after falling at Pittsburgh and Kansas City on either end of its trip to Germany.
